managedAgent.banner: This agent is managed by your organization. Only its managers can make changes.

model.lockedTooltip: Your organization's manager sets this agent's AI model.

allowlist.title: Allowed integrations
allowlist.subtitle: Choose which apps this agent can use. Members can only connect apps you allow here.
allowlist.none: No apps allowed. This agent cannot use any integrations.

notAllowed.title: Not allowed for this agent
notAllowed.body: These apps are connected to your account, but your organization does not allow this agent to use them.

org.title: Organization
org.subtitle: Manage your team, agents, and activity in one place.

share.title: Share {{name}}
share.subtitle: Choose who can use this agent.
share.sectionHelper: Add teammates who can use this agent, and pick who can manage it.

empty.title: No one else has access yet
empty.body: Add a teammate to let them chat with this agent.

share.conversationNote: Everyone with access shares this agent's conversation.
share.chatNote: Shared agent. Everyone with access sees this conversation.
share.selfNote: Changing your own access here can remove your ability to manage this agent.
share.managerRequiresSeat: Only teammates with a Manager seat can manage agents.

levels.managerHint: Can use and reconfigure this agent.
levels.userHint: Can chat with this agent, but not change it.

selfLockout.title: Change your own access?
selfLockout.description: You are about to remove your own ability to manage this agent. You may not be able to undo this yourself.

people.adminNotice: You can view your team. Only the owner can add or remove people.

add.title: Add someone
add.subtitle: Invite a teammate by email. If they don't have Houston yet, we'll send an invitation.
add.invited: Invitation sent to {{email}}. They'll join when they sign in.

roleHelp.user: Members use agents shared with them.

removeConfirm.title: Remove {{name}}?
removeConfirm.description: They'll lose access to every agent shared with them. You can add them again later.

activityTab.error: We couldn't load the activity feed.

empty.title: No activity yet
empty.body: Changes to your team, agents, and apps show up here.

empty.title: No usage yet
empty.body: Once your team starts chatting with agents, message counts show up here.

empty.title: Create your first agent
empty.body: Agents are the assistants your team shares. Create one to get started.
